scope: gap-close: all 5 legacy streams are now migrated. attendees and tickets are per-event sub-resource fan-out reads (list events, then GET /events/{event_id}/<child> for every discovered event id) expressed via the engine's fan_out dialect (S4 engine mini-wave item 2, docs/migration/conventions.md §3) — the ENGINE_GAP that previously blocked both streams (docs/migration/status.json's partial[] entry) is closed.
